name: Nihon M&A Center Inc.
summary: Nihon M&A Center Inc. provides M&A support services for small and medium-sized companies in Japan and internationally. Its support services include reorganization, capital policies, MBO, etc. The company also offers buy-side and sell-side advisory, and intermediary services. Nihon M&A Center Inc. was founded in 1991 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
